message.content:
{
  "analysis": "We have complete OCR resources: 190 full-frame 1fps OCR files and 951 dense 5fps bottom-crop OCR files. The ending OCR explicitly states the game was completed in 262 moves, so the final solution must contain exactly 262 command lines. Current candidate logs are noisy/undercounted and no validated /app/solution.txt has been written. The judge consensus is to run the newly proposed extractors and inspect their outputs before writing any final file.",
  "plan": "Run Panel 3's full-frame scrollback extractor (`full_frame_v2.py`) because full-frame OCR contains prompt history and is more complete than bottom-only crops. Inspect the candidate count/content. If it is not 262, use its output as evidence to refine the unified extractor. No final solution.txt will be written yet.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/work/full_frame_v2.py <<'PY'
import glob, os, re

fs=sorted(glob.glob('/app/work/ocr/frame_*.txt'), key=lambda p:int(os.path.basename(p).split('_')[1].split('.')[0]))

fixes={
    'gY':'y','Y':'y','G':'again','g':'again',
    'move,':'move rug','open tra':'open trap',
    'ulysse':'ulysses','ulyss':'ulysses',
    'pu,':'put','pu':'put',
    'Dopen':'open','dopen':'open',
    'elose':'close','ceage':'cage','eage':'cage','ca_':'cage','ca':'cage',
    'mirro':'mirror',
    'temp':'temple','tem':'temple','tem_':'temple',
    'rin':'ring','dro':'drop',
    'get all fr':'get all from cage','get all from _':'get all from cage','get all from ca_':'get all from cage',
    'get a rom Cage':'get all from cage',
    'get lamp,clove':'get lamp,clove,screwdriver','get lamp,clove,sc':'get lamp,clove,screwdriver','get lamp,clove,screw':'get lamp,clove,screwdriver',
    'put torch,scr':'put torch,screwdriver','put torch,screw':'put torch,screwdriver',
    'get huge, tor':'get huge,torch','get huge,torc':'get huge,torch','get nuge,torcn':'get huge,torch','get huge,tor':'get huge,torch',
    'get egg,sow':'get egg,sword,lamp','get egg, sword,1':'get egg,sword,lamp',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg,go':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg, golden':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg,gold':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'get head, Jade ,cup,egg,goiden':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'Wind ac':'wind canary','Wind canary':'wind canary','win':'wind canary','win_':'wind canary',
    '1li':'lid','1lid':'lid','Lid':'lid','lid':'lid',
    'wW':'w','e,':'e','d.':'d','ne.':'ne',
    'n.':'n',
    'case':'case',
    'put all':'put all in case',
    'p':'put all in case',
}

def fix_cmd(s):
    s=s.strip().rstrip('._').strip()
    s=re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s).strip()
    return fixes.get(s,s)

def clean_prompt(s):
    s=s.strip()
    if not s.startswith('>'):
        return ''
    s=s[1:].strip().rstrip('._').strip()
    s=re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s).strip()
    return fix_cmd(s)

all_prompts=[]
for idx,p in enumerate(fs,1):
    txt=open(p,errors='ignore').read()
    for line in txt.splitlines():
        c=clean_prompt(line)
        if c:
            all_prompts.append((idx,c))

collapsed=[]
for idx,c in all_prompts:
    if collapsed:
        last_idx,last_c=collapsed[-1]
        if (c.startswith(last_c) and len(c)>len(last_c)) or (last_c.startswith(c) and len(last_c)-len(c)<=3):
            if len(c)>=len(last_c):
                collapsed[-1]=(idx,c)
            continue
    collapsed.append((idx,c))

filtered=[]
for n,(idx,c) in enumerate(collapsed):
    is_prefix=False
    for jj,cc in collapsed[n+1:n+30]:
        if cc.startswith(c) and len(cc)>len(c):
            is_prefix=True
            break
        if jj-idx>8:
            break
    if not is_prefix:
        filtered.append((idx,c))

final=[]
for idx,c in filtered:
    if final and final[-1][1]==c:
        continue
    final.append((idx,c))

with open('/app/work/logs/full_frame_v2.log','w') as f:
    for n,(idx,c) in enumerate(final,1):
        f.write(f'{n:03d} f{idx:03d} {c}\n')

print('full_frame_v2_count', len(final))
print('expected', 262)
print('match', len(final)==262)
print('first40', final[:40])
print('last40', final[-40:])
PY
python3 /app/work/full_frame_v2.py
wc -l /app/work/logs/full_frame_v2.log
sed -n '1,140p' /app/work/logs/full_frame_v2.log
",
      "duration": 1.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "sed -n '141,300p' /app/work/logs/full_frame_v2.log
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "sed -n '301,520p' /app/work/logs/full_frame_v2.log; tail -60 /app/work/logs/full_frame_v2.log
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
